data.title: Update CLAUDE.md and KNOWN-ISSUES.md to describe WORKTREE_TRACKING lifecycle and debug-everything gap
data.description:
## Story
991c-1f9d — Doc updates for WORKTREE_TRACKING lifecycle

## testing_mode
GREEN (doc-only change — no RED test required per CLAUDE.md)

## What
Update existing docs (do NOT create new files):

### CLAUDE.md
In the 'Worktree lifecycle' section or 'Architecture' section, add a paragraph after the existing worktree content:

```
**WORKTREE_TRACKING comment lifecycle**: Sprint, fix-bug, and sub-agent task-execution write WORKTREE_TRACKING:start (on transition to in_progress), :complete (via harvest-worktree.sh _harvest_cleanup trap — outcome=merged or discarded), and :landed (in end-session after merge-to-main.sh) as ticket comments. At resume time, sprint and fix-bug scan for unmatched :start comments and autonomously merge (unique commits, no conflicts) or discard (already merged / conflict) each abandoned branch, applying a 4-stage tiebreak cascade for multiple competing branches. See `plugins/dso/docs/contracts/worktree-tracking-comment.md` for comment format. Known gap: debug-everything dispatches bug-fix sub-agents with worktree isolation but does not include a resume scan; follow-up tracked as a known issue.
```

### .claude/docs/KNOWN-ISSUES.md  
Add a known-issues entry for the debug-everything gap:
```
## INC-XXX: debug-everything worktree tracking gap
Sub-agents dispatched by debug-everything have WORKTREE_TRACKING:start comments (from the sub-agent task-execution prompt), but debug-everything's Bug-Fix Mode has no resume scan. If a debug-everything session is interrupted mid-sub-agent, the abandoned worktree must be manually recovered. Workaround: check for WORKTREE_TRACKING:start comments on the bug ticket before re-running, and manually invoke `resolve-abandoned-worktrees.sh` if needed.
```

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] CLAUDE.md contains WORKTREE_TRACKING lifecycle paragraph with :start/:complete/:landed description
- [ ] CLAUDE.md mentions autonomous resume logic and the 4-stage tiebreak cascade
- [ ] CLAUDE.md references worktree-tracking-comment.md contract
- [ ] .claude/docs/KNOWN-ISSUES.md has debug-everything gap entry with workaround
- [ ] No new documentation files created (updates existing docs only)
- [ ] Follow .claude/docs/DOCUMENTATION-GUIDE.md conventions
